mapper.select: SELECT i.INSTR_USER_ID, i.INSTR_UUID, i.INSTR_INTRO, i.INSTR_PROFILE_IMG, m.USER_NAME, (SELECT LISTAGG(SUBJ_CL_NM, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY SUBJ_CL_NM) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sc.SUBJ_CL_NM FROM COURSE c JOIN SUBJECT s ON s.SUBJ_ID = c.SUBJ_ID JOIN SUBJECT_CLASSIFICATION sc ON sc.SUBJ_CL_ID = s.SUBJ_CL_ID WHERE c.INSTR_USER_ID = i.INSTR_USER_ID)) AS SUBJECT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COURSE WHERE INSTR_USER_ID = i.INSTR_USER_ID) AS LECTURE_COUNT FROM INSTRUCTOR i JOIN MEMBER m ON m.USER_ID = i.INSTR_USER_ID WHERE i.INSTR_UUID = #{instrUuid} AND m.ENABLE = 'Y'

SELECT CAREER_SN AS careerSn, INSTR_USER_ID AS instrUserId, CAREER_TYPE_CD AS careerTypeCd, CAREER_STRT_YR AS careerStrtYr, CAREER_END_YR AS careerEndYr, CAREER_CONT AS careerCont, SORT_ORD AS sortOrd FROM INSTRUCTOR_CAREER WHERE INSTR_USER_ID = #{instrUserId} AND CAREER_TYPE_CD = '01' AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY SORT_ORD

SELECT CAREER_SN AS careerSn, INSTR_USER_ID AS instrUserId, CAREER_TYPE_CD AS careerTypeCd, CAREER_STRT_YR AS careerStrtYr, CAREER_END_YR AS careerEndYr, CAREER_CONT AS careerCont, SORT_ORD AS sortOrd FROM INSTRUCTOR_CAREER WHERE INSTR_USER_ID = #{instrUserId} AND CAREER_TYPE_CD = '02' AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY SORT_ORD
